headline: Kroger (KR) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Kroger (KR) stood at $64.55, denoting a -4.01% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Kroger announces retirement of Tim Massa, Executive Vice President and Chief Associate Experience Officer
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) today announced that Tim Massa, Executive Vice President and Chief Associate Experience Officer, will retire on September 18.

headline: Walmart Sinks 8.1% Post Q1 Earnings: Exit WMT Stock or Stay Put?
summary: Walmart slides after Q1 results as fuel and other costs squeeze margins, but e-commerce, ads and memberships keep its growth story intact.
